description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a smooth, flat top and four straight legs positioned at each corner. The tabletop features a natural wood grain pattern, giving it a warm and classic appearance. The legs are simple and unadorned, providing sturdy support and a minimalist aesthetic. The table's edges are straight and slightly beveled, contributing to its clean lines. There are no visible drawers, shelves, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional design. Its size and style make it suitable for use in dining, work, or communal settings in urban environments.
description: A rectangular wooden table with a smooth top, natural wood grain, and four straight legs. Minimalist and functional design with no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and all four legs, highlighting the table's rectangular shape and clean lines.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the table's length and the wood grain pattern on the top, with two legs visible at the ends.
description_view_2: Rear view nearly identical to the front, showing the opposite side of the tabletop and all four legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the table's length and wood grain, with two legs visible.
